Electronic invoicing with ZATCA
Electronic invoicing with ZATCA is designed to...
ZATCA Phase 2 employs a clearance e-invoicing model for Business-to-Business (B2B) transactions.
for Business-to-Consumer (B2C) transactions, Odoo generates a QR code
and subsequently reports these transactions to the Fatoora reporting endpoint.
In a B2B scenario, a Tax Invoice is issued
in a B2C scenario, a Simplified Tax Invoice is generated.

Product: Odoo mentions PoS settings.
Go to Point of Sale --> Configuration --> Settings.

click the oi-arrow-right (right arrow) to open the default Sales journal.
Under the ZATCA tab, click fa-refresh Onboard.

enter the 6-digit OTP retrieved from the Fatoora Portal under the Production Environment.
enter the 6-digit OTP retrieved from the Fatoora Portal under the Production Environment.
